LONDON

Nau i waka aua te kakahu, he taniko taku

(You wove the garment, I have put the border to it)

_Maori Proverb_

TO
 THE COUNTESS OF RANFURLY

Who was a true friend to Artists and
 their Art in New Zealand

This Book is Dedicated
 By the Author
